overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), ascending stairs to an elevated walkway lined with neon billboards and crowds, then descending to street level with massive digital advertisements before entering a covered commercial corridor. The scene features high-density urban architecture with glowing signage and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: ascending stairs and approaching the elevated pedestrian walkway entrance
emerging from dim stairwell into the brighter neon-lit walkway above

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs to reach the elevated pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with red painted edges leading upward
dark metal handrails lining both sides of the staircase
tall palm trees visible at the top of the stairs against the city skyline
opening at the top of the stairs leading to the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a concrete staircase at night, ascending toward an elevated walkway. Metal handrails line the stairs, and palm trees are visible at the top against the backdrop of illuminated skyscrapers. The lighting transitions from dim to bright as the character approaches the walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated pedestrian walkway with commercial billboards

events.description: passing by food stalls and shop fronts along the walkway
large Arasaka corporate billboard becomes visible on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway through moderate crowds of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white crop top and colorful pants walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians walking along the path in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal canopy structure covering the pedestrian path
transparent glass and metal railing along the open side of the elevated walkway
large illuminated advertisement for Real Water on the building facade
massive corporate advertisement for Arasaka with white text on dark background
multiple glowing digital billboards and neon signs on distant buildings
rectangular planters with trees and vegetation along the railing

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered elevated pedestrian walkway with a red painted path, surrounded by moderate crowds. The left side features commercial buildings with large billboards including Real Water and Arasaka advertisements. The right side has glass railings overlooking the city, with planter boxes and numerous neon signs visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level intersection with massive digital advertising displays

events.description: descending from elevated walkway to street level with large digital billboards
crossing the asphalt road with sparse vehicle traffic visible

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, moving between towering digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: car driving along the street with headlights on

entered.detail: massive glowing advertising screens covering the sides of skyscrapers with purple and pink neon
multi-lane asphalt street with red and yellow painted markings
tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection
tall glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to street level at a major intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards glowing with purple and pink neon light. The character crosses the asphalt road with sparse traffic, moving away from the elevated walkway toward a more enclosed commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed commercial corridor with reflective flooring

events.description: entering covered commercial corridor with highly reflective marble floors
lighting shifts to cooler white fluorescent tones from the overhead fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed walkway with reflective marble surfaces and commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: overhead concrete canopy structure blocking most of the sky
highly polished marble or tile flooring reflecting the overhead lights
glass-fronted shops with illuminated interiors and signage
cool white linear lighting fixtures along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a more enclosed commercial corridor with highly reflective marble floors that mirror the cool white overhead lighting. Glass storefronts line the left side while the right side features railings overlooking lower levels. The environment feels more intimate and sheltered compared to the open street, with fewer pedestrians visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a dim urban staircase into a vibrant neon cityscape before descending into a polished commercial interior. It begins by climbing concrete stairs lined with metal handrails, moving from shadow toward the bright lights of an elevated walkway where palm trees stand against a backdrop of skyscrapers. As the camera traverses the red-painted pedestrian path, the view expands to reveal crowded walkways flanked by massive Arasaka billboards and glass railings overlooking the glowing city. The scene then shifts downward to a major street intersection, crossing an asphalt road beneath towering skyscrapers draped in purple and pink digital advertisements. Finally, the camera moves away from the open city air and enters a sheltered commercial corridor, where the environment transforms into an intimate space of reflective marble floors and cool white overhead lighting.
